instruction: Generate a JSON object representing a function call with the correct named parameters.
input: {"function_name": "aggregate_metrics", "description": "Aggregate and summarize time-series metrics", "parameters": {"metric_names": "array of strings", "start_time": "string (ISO 8601)", "end_time": "string (ISO 8601)", "aggregation": "string: avg|sum|min|max|count|p95|p99", "interval": "string: 1m|5m|15m|1h|1d", "filters": "object (optional, tag key-value pairs)", "fill_missing": "string: none|zero|previous|interpolate (default: none)"}, "context": "Get average CPU and memory usage for all production servers in us-east-1 from November 1-7 2023, aggregated in 1-hour intervals, filling missing values with previous"}
response_a:
{
  "function_name": "aggregate_metrics",
  "description": "Aggregate and summarize time-series metrics",
  "parameters": {
    "metric_names": ["CPU", "memory"],
    "start_time": "2023-11-01T00:00:00Z",
    "end_time": "2023-11-07T00:00:00Z",
    "aggregation": "avg",
    "interval": "1h",
    "filters": {
      "tags": {
        "environment": "production",
        "region": "us-east-1"
      }
    },
    "fill_missing": "previous"
  },
  "context": "Get average CPU and memory usage for all production servers in us-east-1 from November 1-7 2023, aggregated in 1-hour intervals, filling missing values with previous"
}

Note: The JSON object above is generated based on the input provided. The actual values for the parameters may vary depending on the specific requirements of the function call.

instruction: Generate a JSON object representing a function call with the correct named parameters.
input: {"function_name": "query_database", "description": "Execute a parameterized database query", "parameters": {"table": "string", "operation": "string: select|insert|update|delete", "conditions": "object (field-value pairs for WHERE clause)", "fields": "array of strings (for SELECT, optional: all fields if not specified)", "order_by": "string (optional)", "limit": "integer (optional)", "offset": "integer (optional)"}, "context": "Get the top 10 most recent orders for customer ID 789 that have status 'shipped', showing only order_id, created_at, and total"}

{
  "function_name": "query_database",
  "description": "Execute a parameterized database query",
  "parameters": {
    "table": "orders",
    "operation": "select",
    "conditions": {
      "status": "shipped",

    "fields": [

      "created_at",
      "total"

    "order_by": "created_at",
    "limit": 10,
    "offset": 0
  },
  "context": "Get the top 10 most recent orders for customer ID 789 that have status 'shipped', showing only order_id, created_at, and total"
}
